zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Erskine於大約1336年出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾厄斯金時，她的父親Robert Erskine27歲，母親Christian Menteih Of Arran32歲。她和Sir Walter Oliphant至少有2個兒子。她去世於1356年在蘇格蘭培爾阿爾達爾吉享年21歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭雷福福爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Erskine于大约1336年出生在苏格兰雷福福爾厄斯金时，她的父亲Robert Erskine27岁，母亲Christian Menteih Of Arran32岁。她和Sir Walter Oliphant至少有2个儿子。她去世于1356年在苏格兰培爾阿爾達爾吉享年21岁，埋葬在苏格兰雷福福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Erskine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the barony of Erskine in Renfrewshire, first recorded in 1226 in the form Erskyn.
History: A family of this name have held a number of Scottish titles, including the earldoms of Mar, Buchan, Kellie, and Rosslyn.

variants.name: Erskin
meanings: Scottish (central Scotland and Fife): variant of   Erskine  . This form of the surname is now more common in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Erskine was born about 1336, in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, her father, Robert Erskine, was 27 and her mother, Christian Menteih Of Arran, was 32. She had at least 2 sons with Sir Walter Oliphant. She died in 1356, in Aberdalgie, Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 21, and was buried in Renfrewshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Erskine est née environ 1336, à Erskine, Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Robert Erskine, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Christian Menteih Of Arran, avait 32 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Sir Walter Oliphant. Elle est décédée en 1356, à Aberdalgie, Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 21 ans, et a été enterrée à Renfrewshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Erskine um 1336 in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Erskine 27 und ihre Mutter Christian Menteih Of Arran 32. Sie hatte mit Sir Walter Oliphant mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1356 im Alter von 21 Jahren in Aberdalgie, Perthshire, Scotland und wurde in Renfrewshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Erskine è nata il circa 1336 nel Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, sua padre, Robert Erskine, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Christian Menteih Of Arran, aveva 32 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Sir Walter Oliphant. Morì nel 1356, nel Aberdalgie, Perthshire, Scotland, all'età di 21 anni, e fu sepolta a Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Erskineが約1336年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアエルスキンで生まれた時，父Robert Erskineは27歳，母Christian Menteih Of Arranは32歳であった。彼女はSir Walter Oliphantとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1356年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアアバーダルジで21歳で死去し，スコットランドレンフリューシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Erskine(이)가 대략 1336년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 어스킨에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Erskine(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Christian Menteih Of Arran(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 Sir Walter Oliphant(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1356년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 압르다기에서 21세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르에 묻혔다.

mn.Aberdalgie, Perth, Scotland: Aberdalgie, Siorrachd Pheairt, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Erskine nasceu aproximadamente 1336, em Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, seu pai, Robert Erskine, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Christian Menteih Of Arran, tinha 32 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Sir Walter Oliphant. Ela faleceu em 1356, em Aberdalgie, Perthshire, Scotland, com 21 anos, e foi sepultada em Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Erskine родилась около 1336 г. в местности эрскаин, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Robert Erskine было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Christian Menteih Of Arran, 32. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Sir Walter Oliphant. Она умерла в 1356 г. в местности абирдалги, пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 21 год и была похоронена в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Erskine nació aproximadamente 1336, en Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, su papá, Robert Erskine, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Christian Menteih Of Arran, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Sir Walter Oliphant. Murió en 1356, en Aberdalgie, Perthshire, Scotland, a la edad de 21 años, y fue sepultada en Renfrewshire, Scotland.
